Here's a summary of the plan I've written:

## Plan: `@ai-sdk/pixel-art` Provider Package

The plan creates **17 files** total â€” 14 new files forming the package, plus 3 modifications to existing files.

### New package structure at `packages/pixel-art/`

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Package config: `@ai-sdk/pixel-art`, version `0.0.0`, deps on `@ai-sdk/provider` + `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` |
| `tsconfig.json` / `tsconfig.build.json` | TypeScript project references (provider + provider-utils) |
| `tsup.config.ts` | Dual CJS + ESM build with `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` constant injection |
| `vitest.node.config.js` / `vitest.edge.config.js` | Test environments (node + edge-runtime) |
| `src/version.ts` | Runtime version constant |
| `src/pixel-art-image-settings.ts` | `PixelArtImageModelId`: `'pixelart-v1' \| 'pixelart-v2' \| 'pixelart-v2-hd' \| (string & {})` |
| `src/pixel-art-image-options.ts` | Zod schema for `providerOptions.pixelArt`: `style`, `pixelDensity`, `outputFormat` |
| `src/pixel-art-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3` â€” POSTs to `/images/generate`, downloads image URLs as `Uint8Array[]` |
| `src/pixel-art-provider.ts` | `createPixelArt()` factory + `pixelArt` default instance; throws `NoSuchModelError` for language/embedding |
| `src/index.ts` | Public exports |
| `src/pixel-art-image-model.test.ts` | Unit tests (request body, options camelCaseâ†’snake_case, aspectRatio warning, error handling, metadata) |
| `src/pixel-art-provider.test.ts` | Factory tests (model construction, unsupported model types) |

### Modifications to existing files
1. **`tsconfig.json`** (root) â€” add `{ "path": "packages/pixel-art" }` alphabetically
2. **`examples/ai-functions/package.json`** â€” add `"@ai-sdk/pixel-art": "workspace:*"`
3. **`examples/ai-functions/src/generate-image/pixel-art/basic.ts`** â€” usage example

### Key design decisions
- Base URL: `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1` â†’ endpoint: `POST /images/generate`
- Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <key>`, env var: `PIXELART_API_KEY`
- `maxImagesPerCall = 4`
- `aspectRatio` â†’ `'unsupported'` warning (API needs explicit width/height)
- `providerOptions.pixelArt.style` â†’ `style` in body; `pixelDensity â†’ pixel_density`; `outputFormat â†’ output_format`
- `providerMetadata` key: `'pixelArt'`
